headline: Is The Travelers Companies (TRV) One of the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy?
summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TRV) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 8, Barclays analyst Alex Scott raised the firm’s price recommendation on The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TRV) to $331 from $312. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The update came as part of a Q1 […]
